title: McKinsey State of Fashion 2026: Healthcare Apparel Segment Analysis
text: McKinsey State of Fashion report provides context for specialty apparel segment including healthcare-focused brands. Report highlights growing consumer preference for authentic brands with purpose and sustainability commitments. Premium positioning strategy gaining acceptance among professional segments willing to pay price premium for quality and brand alignment. Direct-to-consumer and omnichannel integration becoming table stakes for retail success. International expansion increasingly important with emerging markets representing growth frontier. Supply chain resilience and tariff management critical competitive factor. Digital transformation and data analytics enabling more targeted customer engagement and personalization. Healthcare professionals emerging as conscious consumers valuing brand mission and quality alignment with professional identity.
